title: tsconfig.json is missing stricter optional/null safety flags
description: strict: true is enabled, but noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, and noImplicitOverride are not explicitly enabled. With noUncheckedIndexedAccess off, indexed access yields T instead of T | undefined, masking the need for proper narrowing.

title: Test files use non-null assertions `!` instead of guards
description: Multiple tests repeatedly dereference arr[0]! after expect(arr).toHaveLength(1). The ! is a code smell and would be a compile error with noUncheckedIndexedAccess.
recommendation: Replace with a small helper, e.g. const [first] = arr; expect(first).toBeDefined(); expect(first?.x).toBe(...).

title: AuditTx infers transaction callback parameter via a deeply conditional type
description: Sensitive to drizzle-orm overload changes; a version bump could silently change AuditTx to never.
evidence: export type AuditTx = Parameters<DrizzleDb["transaction"]>[0] extends (tx: infer T) => unknown ? T : never;
recommendation: Re-export the drizzle transaction param type directly or add a compile-time `AuditTx extends never` sanity check.

title: Better-sqlite3 native module used without explicit test isolation between suites
description: loadAllMigrations is duplicated across three test files. Maintenance risk: divergent loaders could mask bugs.
recommendation: Extract loadAllMigrations and seedFixture into apps/web/__tests__/__helpers__/sqlite.ts.

title: Unused _cached mutation pattern in singleton
description: Module-level mutable singleton. In Next.js dev with HMR, can leak across module re-evaluations.
recommendation: Add an inline comment justifying the mutation; optionally key on globalThis for HMR safety.

title: next.config.ts uses outputFileTracingRoot to reach monorepo root
description: May drag in unrelated files (crates/, apps/desktop/) into deploy artifact.
recommendation: Verify with pnpm build that the .next/standalone output does not include crates/ or apps/desktop/ sources.

title: ESLint config is minimal: no no-explicit-any, no no-floating-promises
description: Only @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars is configured (warn). S3 will ship async route handlers; rules should be on now.
recommendation: Add no-explicit-any, consistent-type-imports, no-floating-promises, no-misused-promises. Update the stale 'S1 scaffold' comment.

title: Integration test lacks a Promise.all-style concurrency check on the realtime subquery
description: T-015 verifies serial calls but not the documented concurrency case.
recommendation: Add a test that fires N (e.g. 25) runWithAudit calls in parallel via Promise.all and asserts monotonic sequence.

title: assertTransition does not use asserts return-type predicate, unlike assertAccess
description: Inconsistent error pattern between authorization (throws ForbiddenError with code) and state machine (throws new Error).
evidence: throw new Error(`Illegal card state transition: ${from} -> ${to}${t}`);
recommendation: Define IllegalTransitionError extends Error with code = 'STATE_CONFLICT' and missingPreconditions field.

title: Some state-machine tests use as CardState casts to exercise invalid input
description: Casts are scattered; encapsulated helper would be cleaner.
recommendation: Add a single helper `const invalidState = (s: string) => s as unknown as CardState` in __tests__/state-machine/__helpers__/states.ts.

title: smoke.test.ts uses Object.keys(schema) after a comment that the placeholder was a const
description: Length assertion (11) will fail on additive growth in S3.
recommendation: Replace with a name-set assertion listing the 11 names explicitly.

title: No .editorconfig / engines-only Node pin — pnpm install may pull mismatched Node patch versions
description: engines is ">=20.0.0 <21.0.0" — strict on minor but allows any 20.x patch. better-sqlite3@11.5.0 may have ABI issues on old 20.0 patches.
recommendation: Tighten to ">=20.10.0 <21.0.0" and consider .nvmrc at repo root.

title: next.config.ts has typedRoutes: false — no compile-time route safety in S3
description: Disables Next 15's compile-time route type generation. S3 will add API routes; flip before S3 begins.
recommendation: Flip to typedRoutes: true once any app route or API route is added.
